The HKDSE Examinations information of late applicants will be obtained directly from the HKEAA on a regular basis. Since your JUPAS account has just been created recently, you will be required to confirm the HKDSE Examinations years at a later stage. Thank you.

You will be notified by email and SMS when the information is ready to be checked in early to mid-June. You are not required to submit your DSE results to the JUPAS Office.

Thank you.

分享吓自己經歷先
禾本牲喺2016 DSE考生
個陣放榜出嚟得17分
但禾又唔想做後門狗比啲兒登仔笑
所以就走去retake 2017 DSE 最後升咗4分
打晒飛機諗住有得入暴大日研個陣點知佢唔收我 被迫入垃圾埋土BBA
禾就深深不岔係入面hea讀 結果搞到連科垃圾水泡既GDP都爛晒
最後禾就下定決心quit U retake 2020 DSE
預計自己兩科數都5**
順利完成自己畢生志願入暴大日研
